title: thelypteris cornuta
intro: Thelypteris cornuta, also known as the cornutum leather fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which are beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Thelypteris cornuta include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system, while also being used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Thelypteris cornuta can be used as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and benefits.
